days.title: Port Douglas → The Oasis Roadhouse
days.route: 484 km (238 sealed, 246 unsealed). Start line at Raider Park, Port Douglas Sports Complex.

days.title: The Oasis Roadhouse → Aramac
days.route: 551 km (358 sealed, 193 unsealed). Dress-up day: Star Wars.

days.title: Aramac → Toompine
days.route: 568 km (281 sealed, 287 unsealed). The longest day.

days.title: Toompine → Louth
days.route: 509 km (189 sealed, 320 unsealed). Most unsealed of the rally. Dress-up day: Unicorns.

days.title: Louth → Narrandera
days.route: 559 km (374 sealed, 185 unsealed). Through Cobar and into NSW.

days.title: Narrandera → Dargo
days.route: 518 km (471 sealed, 47 unsealed). In Honour Of… Day.

days.title: Dargo → Melbourne
days.route: 345 km (310 sealed, 35 unsealed). Finish line at Point Ormond Reserve, Elwood from 3pm. Buy-backs $250 cash at morning briefing.
